overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding adventure game showing a character in a green robe exploring a medieval castle interior. The character follows a ghostly professor through classrooms and corridors with gothic architecture, stained glass windows, and stone archways, entering a dimly lit office before continuing through sunlit hallways.

scene_state.functional_zone: classroom with wooden tables and stained glass windows

events.description: character turns to follow the ghostly professor floating ahead
ghost floats past the suit of armor near the stone column

agents.ego_description: walking through the classroom following the ghostly professor, observing the medieval decor and suit of armor

notable_agents.action: ghostly professor floating ahead and leading the way through the classroom

entered.detail: full suit of medieval armor standing on display near the wall
long wooden dining tables arranged in rows throughout the room
tall colorful stained glass windows casting patterned light on the floor
thick cylindrical stone support columns with carved capitals

segments.scene_description: The character explores a sunlit classroom filled with wooden tables and stone columns. Colorful light filters through stained glass windows as the character follows a ghostly professor past a suit of armor standing against the wall.

events.description: exits classroom through large wooden door into stone corridor
turns slightly toward the lion statue while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: leaving the classroom and entering the stone corridor, passing the large lion statue on the right

notable_agents.action: ghostly professor continuing to float ahead through the corridor

entered.detail: heavy carved wooden door with metal fixtures and studs
large stone lion statue on pedestal guarding the corridor
gothic stone archways lining the corridor ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character exits the classroom through a heavy wooden door into a stone corridor. A large lion statue stands on the right as the character follows the ghostly professor deeper into the castle.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered professor's office with fireplace and books

events.description: enters the dimly lit office through a wooden door
moves deeper into the dark office away from the entrance light

agents.ego_description: entering the dark office and looking around at the cluttered books, fireplace, and decorations

notable_agents.action: ghostly professor floating near the stone fireplace

entered.detail: ornate stone fireplace with carved mantel and decorative urns
tall unstable stacks of books piled on the floor
large wooden desk with green glass lamp and scattered papers
portraits in gilded frames hanging on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit office cluttered with book stacks and antique furniture. A stone fireplace dominates the room while the ghostly professor floats near the mantel. The character explores the space, examining the framed paintings and wooden desk.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor with tapestries and archways

events.description: exits the office back into the stone corridor
turns corner into another corridor section with different lighting

agents.ego_description: leaving the dark office and walking through the connecting stone corridors

entered.detail: large woven tapestry depicting a scene hanging on the stone wall
gothic pointed arch doorway leading to the next section

segments.scene_description: The character exits the office back into the stone corridors, passing a large wall tapestry. The environment transitions through connecting hallways with gothic archways as the character continues exploring the castle.

scene_state.functional_zone: bright corridor with tall gothic windows

events.description: enters brightly lit corridor with sunlight streaming through tall windows
approaches and begins to open the large gothic arched door

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit corridor toward the exit door, reaching for the handle

entered.detail: tall narrow windows with stone tracery letting in bright midday sunlight
simple wooden bench against the wall beneath the windows
large wooden door with intricate gothic stone arch frame

segments.scene_description: The character enters a brightly lit corridor where sunlight streams through tall gothic windows, casting long shadows across the stone floor. The character approaches a large wooden door with an ornate stone arch frame and reaches to open it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval castle that shifts from a vibrant classroom into a dim interior before returning to sunlit corridors. It begins in a bright classroom where colorful light filters through stained glass, following a ghostly professor past stone columns and a suit of armor. As the character exits through a heavy wooden door, the scene transitions into a stone corridor marked by a large lion statue before moving into a dimly lit, cluttered office filled with book stacks and a dominant stone fireplace. The camera then tracks the character back out into the hallways, passing a large wall tapestry and navigating through a series of gothic archways. Finally, the environment opens into a brightly lit corridor where sunlight streams through tall windows, leading the character toward an ornate stone arch and a large wooden door.
